sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ رِحْلَةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ بِالطَّائِرَةِ شَعَرْتُ بِالتَّعَبِ وَاضْطِرَابِ النَّوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon dugog leta osjećao sam umor i poremećaj sna.
sentences.translationEn: After a long flight I felt tired and my sleep was disrupted.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ فَرْقُ التَّوْقِيتِ بَيْنَ بَلَدَيِ خَمْسَ سَاعَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Razlika u vremenu između dvije zemlje bila je pet sati.
sentences.translationEn: The time difference between the two countries was five hours.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْيَوْمِ الأَوَّلِ نِمْتُ مُبَكِّرًا جِدًّا وَاسْتَيْقَظْتُ فِي مُنْتَصَفِ اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Prvog dana sam zaspao vrlo rano i probudio se u ponoć.
sentences.translationEn: On the first day I fell asleep very early and woke up at midnight.

sentences.arabic: نَصَحَنِي الطَّبِيبُ بِالْبَقَاءِ مُسْتَيْقِظًا حَتَّى الْمَسَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Doktor mi je savjetovao da ostanem budan do večeri.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor advised me to stay awake until evening.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ يَوْمَيْنِ عَادَ نَوْمِي إِلَى طَبِيعَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon dva dana san mi se vratio u normalu.
sentences.translationEn: After two days my sleep returned to normal.
